rootDir.description: The root directory for resolving file paths. Defaults to ".".

definitionFiles.description: Glob patterns that determine which files are scanned for CSS variable definitions and are also linted. Defaults to ["**/*.css"]. Supports negation patterns (e.g. "!**/vendor/**").

lookupFiles.description: Legacy alias for definitionFiles. Overridden when definitionFiles is present.

include.description: Additional glob patterns for definition-only sources (not linted). Supports negation patterns to exclude files. The last matching pattern wins.

no-undefined-variable-use.description: Reports usages of CSS variables that are not defined anywhere in the definition files.

no-variable-type-mismatch.description: Reports when a CSS variable's resolved type does not match the property it is used in. Requires no-undefined-variable-use and no-inconsistent-variable-definition to be enabled.

no-inconsistent-variable-definition.description: Reports when the same CSS variable is defined with conflicting value types across different selectors or files.

enforce-variable-use.description: Enforces that literal values of specified types must use CSS variables instead of being written inline.

oneOf.description: Enable or disable the rule with a severity level.
Enable the rule with detailed configuration.

logFile.description: Path to a file where LSP server logs will be written.

severityToggle.description: "error" / "on": report as error (non-zero exit). "warn": report as warning. "off": disable.

types.description: Value kinds that must be expressed as CSS variables rather than inline literals.

allowedFunctions.description: CSS functions whose arguments are exempt from this rule.

allowedValues.description: Literal values that are always allowed regardless of type.

oneOf.description: A property name to exempt entirely from the rule.

propertyName.description: The CSS property name to partially exempt.

allowedKinds.description: Value kinds that are allowed as inline literals for this property.

allowedProperties.description: CSS properties that are exempt from the rule, either fully (string) or for specific value kinds (object).
